free_text: Correlated energy spectra of light fragments from
720-MeV alpha-induced reactions
#doi:10.1103/PhysRevLett.40.1433
The detection system is a
multiple dE-E telescope consisting of 200-, 500-, and
1000-mu-m-thick silicon surface-barrier detectors in
front of a 10.2-cm-thick NaI scintillation counter.
Normalization errors in the cross sections
are estimated to be less than 20%.
